description: Olympic champion Michael Johnson on the mindset, training, and discipline behind elite sprinting.
title: Slaying the Dragon

description: The story of the 1936 University of Washington rowing crew and their improbable run to Olympic gold.
title: The Boys in the Boat

description: An exploration of how skill is built through deep practice, ignition, and master coaching.
title: The Talent Code

description: How the Oakland A's used data and analytics to compete against richer baseball teams.
title: Moneyball

description: Why the best leaders create environments of trust and safety so teams can thrive.
title: Leaders Eat Last

description: A systematic approach to planning training cycles for peak athletic performance.
title: Periodization Training for Sports

description: Biomechanics and coaching cues for developing world-class sprint technique.
title: The Science of Sprinting

description: A physical therapist's guide to running mechanics, mobility, and staying injury-free.
title: Anatomy for Runners

description: A complete training system using pace, effort, and physiology to improve distance running.
title: Daniels' Running Formula

description: A powerful account of justice, mercy, and the fight to free the wrongly condemned.
title: Just Mercy

description: The life and coaching legacy of legendary Alabama football coach Bear Bryant.
title: Bear: The Hard Life and Good Times of Alabama's Coach Bryant

description: An inside season with the Philadelphia Eagles and the culture of professional football.
title: Bringing the Heat

description: Research on why passion and perseverance, not talent alone, predict success.
title: Grit: The Power of Passion and Perseverance

description: A high school football town in Texas and the lives shaped by Friday night games.
title: Friday Night Lights

description: Olympic sprinter Carl Lewis on competition, training, and life on the track.
title: Inside Track

description: How the brain governs endurance and how athletes push past perceived limits.
title: Endure: Mind, Body, and the Curiously Elastic Limits of Human Performance

description: A surgeon's reflections on diligence, ingenuity, and doing right in medicine.
title: Better: A Surgeon's Notes on Performance

description: A movement and mobility system to build resilient, injury-resistant athletes.
title: Becoming a Supple Leopard

description: The 1960 Rome Olympics and the athletes who reshaped sport and society.
title: Rome 1960: The Olympics That Changed the World

description: A coaching framework for developing functional strength, speed, and power in athletes.
title: Athletic Development: The Art and Science of Functional Sports Conditioning
